name: fork2self
description: Firefox extension that forks GitHub/GitLab/Gitea/Bitbucket repos into your self-hosted Git instance.

scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.sign: bun run package:source && web-ext sign --source-dir dist --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --channel=unlisted --amo-metadata=amo-metadata.json --upload-source-code=web-ext-artifacts/source.zip
